name: aispekt-workspace

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && bun run build:wasm && vite build
scripts.deploy: bun run test:rust && bun run build && bun test && bunx wrangler deploy
scripts.build:wasm: cargo build -p aispekt-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p public && cp target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/aispekt_wasm.wasm public/aispekt.wasm

description: Evidence-cited analyzer for AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md agent instruction files: score, findings, and what to cut - every rule backed by a research citation.
